# Sri Vidya Shakti Sadhana

## Services

- [Mantra Diksha](http://srividyashaktisadhana.local/service/mantra-diksha/) - Initiating devotees into divine mantra practices for spiritual discipline and transformation.
- [Meditations](http://srividyashaktisadhana.local/service/meditations/) - Helping people achieve mental peace, focus, emotional balance, and spiritual awareness.
- [Spiritual Guidance](http://srividyashaktisadhana.local/service/spiritual-guidance/) - Helping devotees overcome confusion, stress and spiritual obstacles through guidance and ancient wisdom.
- [Workshops](http://srividyashaktisadhana.local/service/workshops/) - Structured learning experiences for seekers who wish to deepen their spiritual journey.
- [Puja and Havan](http://srividyashaktisadhana.local/service/puja-and-havan/) - Sacred rituals performed for peace, prosperity, protection, spiritual cleansing, and family harmony.
- [Srividya Sadhana](http://srividyashaktisadhana.local/service/srividya-sadhana/) - Spiritual practices for divine connection, protection, inner transformation, and consciousness.

## Holis

## Puja

- [Baglamukhi Sadhana](http://srividyashaktisadhana.local/puja/baglamukhi-sadhana/) - Performed for victory over enemies, removal of obstacles, protection from negative energies, and success in difficult situations.
- [Bala Tripura Sundari Sadhana](http://srividyashaktisadhana.local/puja/bala-tripura-sundari-sadhana/) - A sacred sadhana for peace, positivity, spiritual growth, family harmony, and fulfillment of divine desires.
- [Varahi Sadhana Puja](http://srividyashaktisadhana.local/puja/varahi-sadhana-puja/) - Performed for protection, financial growth, business success, courage, and removal of negative influences from life.
